pack_name: Oil and Gas Sector Compliance Overlay
description: Sector-specific screening controls for Nigerian upstream, midstream, and downstream oil and gas documents, including licence, HSE, environmental, decommissioning, metering, reporting, and decarbonisation evidence.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay for Oil and Gas Sector Compliance Overlay; intended to be applied with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Nigerian statutes, regulations, regulator guidance, codes, directives, and sector rules available at rule-pack publication time.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Petroleum Industry Act, 2021
used_for: host community and petroleum operations governance

primary_sources.name: NUPRC Guidelines and Safety/Environment regulatory framework
NMDPRA regulatory framework
primary_sources.issuer: Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority

rules.title: Petroleum licence, lease, permit, or regulatory authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for licence, lease, permit, NUPRC/NMDPRA authorization, or regulatory approval evidence.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: Health, safety, and environment management controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for HSE plan, safety case, risk assessment, emergency response, or occupational health evidence.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.
